name: HEARTWOOD | Harvey Miller
description:
[ANYPOV] ⚒️[HEARTWOOD BLACKSMITH] | You’re from the city, born and bred, but after your grandmother’s passing, you depart from the skyscrapers and modern pursuits to settle down in the village your grandma visited constantly. 

It was her dying wish for you to continue her support and assistance there, so you really had no choice but to oblige. Heartwood Village is a completely new change in a scenery: new people, new habits, new ways of living. 

Luckily for you, the village’s blacksmith, Harvey Miller, seems more than happy to help you get accustomed to your new life. 

*[FIRST INSTALLMENT OF THE HEARTWOOD SERIES]*

**RONAN (SECOND INSTALLMENT):** https://www.janitorai.com/characters/e50b8c0c-340e-4c5e-a0fc-7f386fe27799_character-librarian-ronan-miller
